summary: Iteration 130: PvP Integration into Coming Soon and Notifications. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Coming Soon cards show Support/Boycott buttons for other players' content, HQ page shows 3 divisions with proper styling, Notifications page has filter buttons and displays CineWorld News notifications. Test user has no own Coming Soon content, so PvP Investigate/Defense buttons not visible (expected - they only appear for own content with boycotts).
critical_code_review_comments: ComingSoonSection.jsx correctly integrates PvP: Support/Boycott for other players, Investigate/Defense for own content
identified_saboteurs array returned in /api/coming-soon/{id}/details when is_own_content=true AND boycott_count>0
SaboteurCard component shows Counter-Attack (Attacca) and Legal (Causa) buttons with proper data-testids
PvP buttons correctly disabled when division level is 0, with 'Sblocca in HQ' hints
NotificationsPage.jsx handles legal_action_won, legal_action_lost, pvp_counter_attack types with routing to /hq
HqPage.jsx displays all 3 divisions with proper colors (cyan/orange/purple) and upgrade requirements
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and Coming Soon content from TestStudio94
context_for_next_testing_agent: PvP integration into Coming Soon and Notifications fully verified. Key findings: 1) Test user (test@test.com) has no own Coming Soon content, so PvP Investigate/Defense buttons not visible - this is EXPECTED behavior. 2) Coming Soon card from TestStudio94 shows Support/Boycott buttons correctly. 3) HQ page shows all 3 divisions at level 0 with proper 'Bloccato' badges. 4) Notifications page shows CineWorld News notifications with severity badges. 5) PvP notification types (legal_action_won, legal_action_lost, pvp_counter_attack) route to /hq via link field.

coming_soon_details_identified_saboteurs.returns: identified_saboteurs array when is_own_content=true AND boycott_count>0

coming_soon_pvp_buttons.condition: Shown for own content when boycott_count > 0
coming_soon_pvp_buttons.note: Not visible in test because test user has no own Coming Soon content

coming_soon_sblocca_hints.text: Sblocca Investigativa in HQ, Sblocca Operativa in HQ

hq_page_divisions.features: Level badges, daily limits, upgrade costs, 'Bloccato' badges

notifications_pvp_routing.routing: All route to /hq via link field or typeRoutes mapping

frontend_ui_verification.dashboard_coming_soon: Shows 'PROSSIMAMENTE' section with Coming Soon cards
frontend_ui_verification.coming_soon_expanded: Shows hype bar, anteprima, aspettative, notizie, commenti, Support/Boycott buttons
frontend_ui_verification.hq_page: Shows QUARTIER GENERALE with 3 division cards, player stats, upgrade buttons, legal history toggle
frontend_ui_verification.notifications_page: Shows NOTIFICHE with filter buttons (Tutte, Critiche, Importanti, Positive), CineWorld News notifications
